summary: Frontend-only testing of font updates (Georgia/Times New Roman) and Framer Motion stagger animations. All 7 inner pages verified visually and via JS font evaluation. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: font-heading and font-body Tailwind classes must be explicitly applied on components where Tailwind's utility classes override the global CSS (index.css h1-h6 + body rules cover most cases, but any component using className with a conflicting font-sans would need font-heading explicitly). Currently appears fine from visual check.

Framer Motion animated elements count (7) on dashboard is reasonable — stat cards + health section + campaigns. Consider verifying all variants are correctly named in the page components if animation count seems low.
seed_data_creation: Re-created test user and session in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages verified: Dashboard (/dashboard), Discovery (/discovery), Pipeline (/campaigns - NOT /pipeline), Analytics (/analytics), Inbox (/inbox), Settings (/settings), Payments (/payments). Body font confirmed as 'Times New Roman, Times, serif'. All heading fonts confirmed as 'Georgia, serif'. Background rgb(10, 15, 46) = #0A0F2E confirmed. Framer Motion elements present on dashboard (7 animated elements). All pages render with dark navy theme and teal accents. Note: route for CampaignPipeline is /campaigns not /pipeline.

font_verification.heading_font: Georgia, serif - CONFIRMED on H1, H3 elements

pages_verified.Dashboard: PASS - stat cards, health bar, campaign list visible
